INVENTORY_EMPTY_DESC: Click any backpack item to inspect its usage instructions and operational details.
ITEM_1_DESC: Smooth, heavy grey stone blocks mined from deep caves... useful for structured defensive walls.
ITEM_1_USE: Press Right-Click to build solid structures.
ITEM_2_DESC: Rich brown fertile soil. Can be placed or tilled... organic base of the Golden Bazaar plains.
ITEM_3_DESC: Vibrant, green grass turf. Perfect for establishing landscaping boundaries.
ITEM_4_DESC: Sturdy oak logs chopped from ancient forests... crucial material for dynamic workshop blueprints.
ITEM_4_USE: Used in the workshop to craft wooden planks and combat broadswords.
ITEM_5_DESC: Lush, green shrubbery leaves... harvested from trees. Can drop seeds on gathering.
ITEM_5_USE: Use in composting recipes or for building decorative garden canopies.
ITEM_15_DESC: A secure iron bucket containing glowing, dynamic orange lava fuel.
ITEM_15_USE: Hold and press Right-Click to place flowing lava. Can be traded with the Merchant.
ITEM_16_DESC: A fresh, crispy drumstick fried using dynamic lava fuel... highly therapeutic.
ITEM_16_USE: Eat from the backpack to fully restore 1 Heart.
ITEM_17_DESC: A sturdy, hand-crafted oak sword... infinite durability. Essential for plains defense.
ITEM_17_USE: Press Left-Click (or E) to swing and defeat hostile zombies.
ITEM_18_DESC: Plump wheat seeds. Can be planted on grass or dirt blocks to grow wheat fields.
ITEM_18_USE: Equip and Right-Click on top of grass/dirt blocks. Crops grow over time!
ITEM_20_DESC: Golden, sun-ripened wheat grains harvested from mature crops... essential baking material.
ITEM_20_USE: Gather enough grains to craft advanced survival rations.
MENU_RESET_WARNING_DESC: Warning: Starting a new game will permanently delete your saved castle, inventory blocks, and quest progression on disk. This cannot be undone.
Collect 10 leaf blocks to help repair th: Collect 10 leaf blocks to help repair the village roofs. Punch tree leaves to harvest them.
Craft 3 soil blocks in your blueprint wo: Craft 3 soil blocks in your blueprint workshop (C Key) by combining leaves and dirt.
Bring 1 Lava Bucket (Slot 6) to the Merc: Bring 1 Lava Bucket (Slot 6) to the Merchant. Select the Lava Bucket and Right-Click him.
Defeat the mountain zombie outside the c: Defeat the mountain zombie outside the castle gates. Select your wooden sword (Slot 8) and Left-Click him.
Ascend high into the sky! Build upwards: Ascend high into the sky! Build upwards up to height Y=18 using your blocks.
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_QUEST_COMPLETE:
Oh! Dynamic lava! Delicious! Here is your Fried Chicken! And as a special reward for completing my quest, here are 3x EXTRA Fried Chickens!

Oh no, wait! Look at the radar! The Guard is calling for help near the tower, a zombie is approaching the llanuras!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_SUCCESS: Hmmm! Hot, geothermal, delicious lava! Thank you! Here is your crispy Fried Chicken! It is fresh, delicious, and highly therapeutic.
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_FAILED: Hmmm? It seems you are completely out of Lava Buckets! Bring me a Bucket of Lava (Slot 6) and I will fry up a fresh Chicken!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_QUEST_COMPLETE:
Thank goodness you found our bazaar, traveler! We were worried you were lost in the ocean bay. Here are some Wood Blocks to help you build a shelter.

Please check your mission tracker, you need to collect leaves to build a thatched roof!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_INTRO: Hello, traveler! The Golden Bazaar plains are peaceful today. But be very careful if you explore the deep mountain caves at night!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_INTRO: Hello! I am tending these crops to keep the market well stocked. The soil of the Golden Bazaar is rich and bountiful!
DIALOGUE_GUARD_INTRO: Hail, traveler! I stand watch over this village bazaar. Rest easy; my steel blade will keep the cave zombies at bay!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_INTRO: Hmmm! Welcome to my Golden Bazaar stall, traveler. Are you here to trade some hot lava, or just looking around?
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_CHOICE_TRADE: I want to trade a Lava Bucket for Fried Chicken!
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_ABOUT: I am the Master Merchant of these plains. I gather geothermal lava to fry our legendary chickens! It keeps them hot, crispy, and highly therapeutic.
DIALOGUE_MERCHANT_TRADE_INFO: Ah, excellent! My lava-chicken fryers are hungry for fuel. One Bucket of Lava (Slot 6) gets you one famous Fried Chicken!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_NIGHT: The sun has set, traveler... watch your back, for the mountain zombies emerge in the dark.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_OCEAN: The tropical ocean breeze feels wonderful today. It's a fine day to sail the bay!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_GLACIERS: Brrr! The polar glaciers are freezing... the frost penetrates even our heaviest wool hoods!
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_NEON: The energy paths of these ruins are pulsating intensely. Careful not to touch the glowing pathways.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_SWAMP: Stagnant water, thick mud... this swamp of sighs holds many ancient secrets in its mist.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_CLOUD: Look down, traveler! Floating so high in the cloud kingdom makes me feel closer to the sky.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_PLAINS_A: Greetings! The soil of the Golden Bazaar is rich, making it the perfect place to set up merchant stalls.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_PLAINS_B: Welcome to our village bazaar! Let me know if you need any directions across these step-plateaus.
DIALOGUE_VILLAGER_PLAINS_C: Greetings, traveler! We live a peaceful life here, as long as the mountain zombies stay inside their dark caves.
DIALOGUE_FARMER_NIGHT: I must retire soon, but I worry... if a frost hits tonight, it could ruin our young sprouts.
DIALOGUE_FARMER_GLACIERS: Tilling frozen soil is hard work, but we must grow hardy winter roots to survive.
DIALOGUE_FARMER_NEON: The hydroponic tech in these ruins is fascinating... these glowing cyan blocks help stimulate growth!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_PLAINS_A: Hello! I am tending these crops to keep the market well stocked. The soil of the Golden Bazaar is rich and bountiful!
DIALOGUE_FARMER_PLAINS_B: A fine day for harvesting! Remember, punch mature golden crops to gather both wheat and seeds.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_NIGHT: Hold, traveler! The night is dark and full of dangers. Draw your wooden sword if you explore the valleys.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_GLACIERS: My steel plate armor is freezing in this glacier Cap! But a guard's duty never freezes.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_NEON: The automated cyber-grids are online. No hostiles shall trespass into the cyber basin while I stand watch.
DIALOGUE_GUARD_PLAINS_A: Hail, traveler! I stand watch over this village bazaar. Rest easy; my steel blade will keep the cave zombies at bay!
DIALOGUE_GUARD_PLAINS_B: Patrolling the llanuras has been peaceful today. But I always keep an eye on those dark mountain crevices.
